name: Ops Dash Connector
author: Legacy Sales Engineering
changelog: 1.6.3 — Fixes self-delete on symlinked hosts: the 1.6.2 cleanup could fail to recognise its own folder on hosts that symlink wp-content and delete itself on activation (plugin file does not exist). Cleanup now identifies itself via realpath, never touches the canonical opsdash-connector folder, and runs after activation instead of during it. 1.6.2 — self-healing cleanup of broken 1.5.x-1.6.0 installs. 1.6.1 — packaging fix. 1.6.0 — self-updating. 1.5.0 — robots.txt, sitemap, heading fixes.
